heatmap_negativeimpact_tooltip: Elements with negative effects on guests
heatmap_tooltip_condition: Rides and Utilities will be highlighted in a colour based on their current condition.
heatmap_tooltip_dietaryrequirements:
Highlights Guests based on if their Dietary Requirements are met. 
Select a shop to see which guests can eat there.
heatmap_tooltip_guestexperience_coldness: Guests are highlighted according to their Warmth Need.
heatmap_tooltip_guestexperience_energy: Guests are highlighted according to their Energy need.
heatmap_tooltip_guestexperience_entertai: Guests are highlighted according to their Entertainment need.
heatmap_tooltip_guestexperience_hunger: Guests are highlighted according to their Hunger need.
heatmap_tooltip_guestexperience_luxury: Guests are highlighted according to their Souvenir need.
heatmap_tooltip_guestexperience_mood: Guests are highlighted to show whether their mood is positive or negative.
heatmap_tooltip_guestexperience_nausea: Guests are highlighted according to their Nausea need.
heatmap_tooltip_guestexperience_panic: Guests are highlighted according to their Panic need.
heatmap_tooltip_guestexperience_sunburns: Guests are highlighted according to their Suncream Need. Guest Services are highlighted to show if they sell Suncream or not.
heatmap_tooltip_guestexperience_thirst: Guests are highlighted according to their Thirst need.
heatmap_tooltip_guestexperience_toilet: Guests are highlighted according to their Toilet need.
heatmap_tooltip_guestexperience_wetness: Guests are highlighted according to their Dryness Need.
heatmap_tooltip_guesttolerances_fear:
Highlights Guests based on if their Fear tolerance is met.
Select a ride to see which guests will be happy to ride it.
heatmap_tooltip_guesttolerances_gforces:
Highlights Guests based on if their G-Force tolerance is met.
Select a ride to see which guests will be happy to ride it.
heatmap_tooltip_guesttolerances_maxspeed:
Highlights Guests based on if their Max Speed tolerance is met.
Select a ride to see which guests will be happy to ride it.
heatmap_tooltip_guesttolerances_nausea:
Highlights Guests based on if their Nausea tolerance is met.
Select a ride to see which guests will be happy to ride it.
heatmap_tooltip_guesttolerances_overall:
Highlights Guests based on whether all their tolerances are met.
Select a ride to see which guests will be happy to ride it.
heatmap_tooltip_guesttolerances_queuelen:
Highlights Guests based on if their Queue Length tolerance is met.
Select a ride to see which guests will be happy to ride it.
heatmap_tooltip_guesttolerances_rideheig:
Highlights Guests based on if their Ride Height tolerance is met.
Select a ride to see which guests will be happy to ride it.
heatmap_tooltip_guesttolerances_scenery:
Highlights Guests based on if their Scenery tolerance is met.
Select a ride to see which guests will be happy to ride it.
heatmap_tooltip_needscleaning:
Vomit and Litter will be highlighted on the path. 
Toilets and Bins will highlight in a colour based on their level of cleanliness.
heatmap_tooltip_pickpocketing: Highlights areas where recent acts of theft have occurred.
heatmap_tooltip_poolsafety: Pools will be highlighted in a colour based on their current pool safety rating.
heatmap_tooltip_power: Highlights Power Generators, facilities that draw power, and shows their distribution status.
heatmap_tooltip_rideincome: Highlights ride booths in a colour based on how much Income they are bringing in.
heatmap_tooltip_score: The local scenery value is overlaid onto the park.
heatmap_tooltip_securitycoverage: Highlights areas monitored by Security Guards and Security Cameras.
heatmap_tooltip_shopprofit: Highlights shops and vending machines in a colour that shows if the amenity is making a profit or a loss.
heatmap_tooltip_staffbreaks: Highlights Staff in a colour based on if they have a break scheduled or not.
heatmap_tooltip_staffmorale: Highlights Staff in a colour based on their current morale.
heatmap_tooltip_staffpay: Highlights Staff in a colour based on their level of pay.
heatmap_tooltip_thunderstormrisk: Highlights rides and utilities based on their likelihood of being struck by lightning.
heatmap_tooltip_vandalism: Highlights objects and facilities that have been vandalised.
heatmap_tooltip_water: Highlights Water Pumps and Filters and shows their distribution status.
heatmap_tooltip_watercleanliness: Pools and flumes will change colour based on how clean their water is.
heatmap_watertemperatureregulatorconflic: Temperature Regulator Conflict: Water taking average temperature
